_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: We considered 10,487 unique ICD-10 codes available in the UKBiobank 200K dataset... a total of 15,889 genes were included in the final analysis
details: Provided 10,487 unique ICD-10 codes and whole exome sequencing data for 15,889 genes after filtering for rare LoF variant analysis
